title: DEAYOU 10 Pack Kraft Paper Flower Gift Bags, Brown Bouquet Bag Box with Handle, Small Brown Paper Carrier Tote Bags with Waterproof Lining for Floral Arrangements, Party Favor, Ultra Thick,22×10×5.3cm
features: Our small brown gift bags are made of premium 260g high density thicken kraft paper with waterproof interior and flat solid bottom, heavy duty, odor-free and not easy to tear, sturdy and reusable. Perfect for gift giving, shopping, retail, mechandise, wedding welcome bags

Coming with 10 packs of kraft paper flower gift bags with handles. Each mini plain paper goodie bag measure approx. 8.6"/22cm L x 4"/10cm W x 5.3"/14cm H (13"/33cm H including the handle). Sufficient quantity and perfect size to pack hand tied bouquets, small items, gifts, treats

DEAYOU small kraft paper gift bags with long handles are not only perfect to pack hand tied bouquets, fresh flowers and dried flowers, floral arrangements, small potted plants, but also ideal for party favors, treats, candy, chocolate, handcrafts, toys, small goodies. Great for weddings, babyshower, birthday, garden party

Our mini craft paper tote bags are designed with long shaped hand strap, which is fixed by metal buckles, strong and easy to carry. Feature with waterproof interior layer and sturdy square bottom to stably stand up while loading, safe and convenient to use

These kraft cardboard bouquet bags are blank, which allow you to customize them with stickers, markers, paints, stamps, labels, logo. Just draw or write anything you like to impress your guests. Good for boutiques, stores, small businesses. Vintage style to add a sense of elegance
